pi_items.source: setup_virtualmin.sh line 268 creates domain 'acmecorp.test'; setup_task.sh line 11-14 verifies and uses this domain

PHP official documentation (https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.fpm.configuration.php) confirms 'dynamic' is a valid PM mode; setup_task.sh line 61 sets it to 'dynamic'; verifier.py line 106 checks for this value

PHP official documentation confirms pm.max_children is the maximum number of child processes in dynamic mode; task.json metadata line 20 and task description line 20 both specify 40; verifier.py line 107 checks for value 40

PHP official documentation confirms pm.start_servers sets initial child processes on startup; task.json metadata line 21 and task description line 21 both specify 10; verifier.py line 108 checks for value 10

PHP official documentation confirms pm.min_spare_servers is minimum idle child processes; task.json metadata line 22 and task description line 22 both specify 5; verifier.py line 109 checks for value 5

PHP official documentation confirms pm.max_spare_servers is maximum idle child processes; task.json metadata line 23 and task description line 23 both specify 15; verifier.py line 110 checks for value 15

privileged_info_summary: The task tunes PHP-FPM pool configuration for the Virtualmin virtual server 'acmecorp.test' with specific process manager settings. All configuration parameters are legitimate PHP-FPM settings: pm mode must be set to 'dynamic'; pm.max_children must be 40 (maximum child processes); pm.start_servers must be 10 (initial processes on startup); pm.min_spare_servers must be 5 (minimum idle processes); pm.max_spare_servers must be 15 (maximum idle processes). These values are configured in a real PHP-FPM pool configuration file at /etc/php/*/fpm/pool.d/*.conf. The verifier checks that the file is modified, service is active, and all values are correctly set to pass the task.
